INST1: In this task, you are asked to tap at the specified rate for <NUMTRIALS> trials of <TIME> seconds each. You will see a fixation cross blink at the target tapping rate. Begin tapping at that rate to prepare. When the cross disappears, you should continue to tap at that rate until the trial has finished.
TOBEGIN: Press the response key to begin
TRAINING: Click along with the flash. Continue clicking at the same rate when it stops.
GO: Continue tapping at the same rate
STATUS: You made <HITS> keypresses. Press X to continue.
